_meta.description: Sample data for the Poems library section

poems.title: For My Mother
verses: Through every storm, you held my hand,
When I was lost, you helped me stand.
Your love, a beacon shining bright,
Has guided me through darkest night.
No words could ever fully say,
How much you mean to me each day.
But Mom, I hope that you can see,
The world you've given, just by being free.
poems.previewLines: Through every storm, you held my hand, When I was lost, you helped me stand...

poems.title: Our Five Years
verses: Five years ago, we took a chance,
Two hearts that dared to join the dance.
Through laughter, tears, and everything between,
You're still the best I've ever seen.
Sarah, my love, my partner, my friend,
I'll choose you over and over again.
Here's to five more, and fifty more after,
A lifetime of love, joy, and laughter.
poems.previewLines: Five years ago, we took a chance, Two hearts that dared to join the dance...

poems.title: Happy 8th Birthday
verses: Eight whole years of being YOU,
Of adventures old and dreams brand new!
Your smile lights up the whole wide room,
Like sunshine breaking through the gloom.
Emma, you're magic through and through,
There's nobody quite like you.
So blow your candles, make a wish,
Today's YOUR day — the whole delish!
poems.previewLines: Eight whole years of being YOU, Of adventures old and dreams brand new!...

poems.title: I'm Sorry
verses: I know that words can't undo the past,
Can't mend what's broken, make it last.
But Dad, I need to say what's true—
I'm sorry for what I put you through.
You deserved so much better from me,
I see that now, so clearly.
I'm working hard to make things right,
To be the son that makes you proud at night.
poems.previewLines: I know that words can't undo the past, Can't mend what's broken, make it last...
